def positive_print_debugging_leftover():
    rule_id = "print_debugging_leftover"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "print() calls left in non-test Python functions that do not look like obvious main-entrypoint output."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
